message:
fix: address code review findings (DRY, correctness, interface cleanup)

- Slice history to last ~10 turns before passing to ForkSummarize so the
  cheap model summarizes recent actions, not the entire session
- Extract selectStrategy helper to eliminate copy-pasted switch in
  NewSession and RestoreSession
- Extract buildRecallTool shared function to deduplicate recall tool
  definitions between RecallStrategy and SessionLogStrategy
- Remove previous orient turns before appending in OODAStrategy to
  prevent accumulation across ManageContext calls
- NewSessionLog now returns an error when loadFromDisk fails instead of
  silently ignoring it; added comment explaining malformed line skipping
- Remove unused pressure parameter from ManageContext interface (every
  strategy computes pressure internally)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
